summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DSA Tracker enhanced features. Backend: Enhanced /api/stats with category_progress working perfectly, sorting functionality working, but bulk-update endpoint failing with 404. Frontend: All new UI features working excellently including table/grid views, bulk actions, category progress bars, sorting, and filtering.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 'Topic not found' even with valid topic IDs
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks bulk status update functionality in frontend

integration_issues.issue: Frontend bulk action buttons work but backend bulk-update endpoint fails

passed_tests: Enhanced /api/stats endpoint with category_progress field (16 categories with correct structure)
All sorting functionality (name, difficulty, category, status, created_at with asc/desc)
Overall progress bar shows correct 0% initially
Pattern Progress section shows all 16 patterns with progress bars
Table view (default) with compact rows and checkboxes
Grid view toggle switches to card layout successfully
Bulk action bar appears with correct buttons and selection count
Category progress bars are clickable and filter topics (Arrays: 22 topics)
All filter functionality works (search, category, difficulty, status)
View mode toggle between table and grid works perfectly
All existing API endpoints working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 90% (9/10 major features working, bulk-update endpoint failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the bulk-update endpoint (/api/topics/bulk-update) which returns 404 'Topic not found' error even with valid topic IDs. The endpoint exists in server.py but seems to have an issue with topic ID matching or database query.
